titleStmt.title: SII 5.703: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 703. (A.R. No. 139 of 1895). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūmālai miṭai[ n tu] poṉmālai tikaḻtara pāmālai malin=ta parumaṇit tiraḷpuya(t)t tirunila maṭantaiyoṭu jayamaka ḷiruppat taṉ varai mārvan tanateṉap peṟṟut tirumakaḷ Orutani Iruppak kalaimakaḷ coṟṟiṟam puṇarn=ta kaṟppinaḷāki viruppoṭu nāvakat tiruppat ticaitoṟun tikiriyoṭu ceṅkol naṭappa Akilapuvanamuṅ kavippator putumati pola veṇkuṭai mīmicai niṟpa karuṅkali yoḷittu vaṉ(p)pilattiṭaik kiṭappak kuḷattiṭait teluṅka(l) vīmaṉ vilaṅkal mīmicai yeṟavum kaliṅkapūmiyaik ka
ṉaleri parukavum Aimpaṭaip paruvattu vempaṭai tāṅki veṅkai maṇṭala n=tā ṅakinitirun tu vaṭaticai yaṭippaṭuttaruḷit teṉticait tarumamu n=tā namu n=ta ḻaittu vetamum meṉmaiyum Ātiyukampolat talaittalai ciṟappa van=ta ruḷi velakkarum porppuli yānai pārttivar cūṭa niṟaimaṇi makuṭam muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭi mannuyirk kellā minnuyir tāypol taṉnoḷi parappit tanittani paran tu maṇmuḻu taḷippa manuneṟi vaḷarttu taṉ koyiṟ koṟ
ṟavācalpuṟattu maṇinā voṭuṅka muraicukaḷ muḻaṅka vicaiyamum pukaḻu melme loṅkac ceḻiyar veñcuram pukac ceralar kaṭal puka Aḻitaru ciṅkaṇa rañci neñcalamarak kaṅkar tiṟaiyiṭak kannaṭar venniṭak koṅka rotuṅkiṭak koṅkaṇar cāya maṟṟetticai maṉṉaruṉ taṉataṭik karaṇeṉat tirumalarc cevaṭiyurimaiyi liṟaiñcat tollai yeḻulakuṉ toḻuteḻat toṉṟiya mullaivāṇakai mukko
kkiḻānaṭi Umaiyoṭu caṅkara(ṉ) nimaiyaRead cimayat.camaiyat tiruṉtaṉaneṉap poruṉti yuṭaniruppa Aṅkavaṉ makuḻuṅ kaṅkaiyoppākit terivaiyar tilatam tiyākapatākai purikuḻal maṭappiṭi punitakuṇavanitai tiripuvanamuḻutuṭaiyā ḷivaṉ tiruvuḷḷat taruḷu muḻutuṭaiyāḷeṉ ṟuṭaṉiruppac cempoṉ virasiṁ hāsanattu mukkokkiḻānaṭikaḷoṭum vīṟṟiruṉtaruḷiya kopparakecaripaṉ
marāna tribhu vaṉaccakra vattikaḷ śrīvikra macoḻade vaṟku yāṇṭu 7vatu Uṭaiyār kulottuṅkacoḻatevar[k*ku] naṉṟāka Uṭaiyār svā mide var śrīkaṇṭacivar virutarājabha yaṅkaravaḷanāṭṭu maṇṇināṭṭuc coḻamāttāṇṭaccatuppetimaṅkalattup piṭākai maṅkalakkuṭiyi leḻuntaruḷuvitta Uṭaiyār kolottuṅkacoḻaīśva ramuṭaiyārkku veṇṭum nimantaṅkaḷukku Iṟuppa
tāka Ivūr brāhma ṇaṉ kārampicceṭṭut tiruvaraṅka nārāyaṇapaṭṭanum paciṇṭippuṟattu Ejña murtti paṭṭanum Uḷḷiṭṭār pakkal Ittevar tevakaṉmi Āriyaṉ vāsu tevapaṭṭaṉperilum Uṭaiyār svā mide var śrīkaṇṭacivar Uṭaiyār kaṉmikaḷ perilum vilaikoṇṭuṭaiya pra māṇappaṭi nilamāy muṉnuṭaiyārum paḻamperum brahmade camāy varukinṟapaṭiyun tavirntu Ittevarkku yā
ṇṭu Āṟāvatumutal tevatānam Iṟaiyiliyāy veṟupiṟiṉta vikkiramacoḻanallūrilum Añcaraiye nālumāviṉ kiḻaraiyināl nilavopāti paḻaviṟai nellu munnūṟṟaṟupattaiṅkalane patakku nānāḻi niccayitta Opāti nellu Irunūṟṟeṇpatiṉ kalam Itanuḷ Ittevar śrīkoyilum tirumuṟṟamum dīrtta kkuḷamum maṭaviḷākamumāy yāṇṭu Āṟāvatumutal niṅkalukku U
ṭalāka nikkina nilam Onpatumā varaikkāṇi muntirikaiyināl nilavopātip paḻaviṟai nellu Irupattaṟukalane tūṇip patakku nānāḻi niśca yitta Opāti nellu Irupattirukalane yeḻukuṟuṇi yirunāḻi nikki nilam Añce nālumā mukkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻaraiyināl nellu munnūṟṟu muppattaiṅkalane yirutūṇi niśca yitta Opāti nellu Irunūṟṟaimpat teḻukalane tūṇiyaṟunāḻi taravopātip paḻaviṟai nellu
munnūṟṟu muppatteṇkalane mukkuṟuṇi nānāḻi niccayitta Opāti nellu Irunūṟṟaimpat tonpatinkalane tūṇip patakku nānāḻi Ivai purovaritinaikkaḷanāyakamRead neṟkuppai.neṟpukkaiyuṭaiyā neḻuttu Ivai purovaritinaikkaḷanāyakam Uvaṟūrnāṭṭuveḷā neḻuttu Ivai purovaritinaikkaḷanāyakam nāṅkoṟṟa neḻuttu Ivai purovaritinaikkaḷattu mukaveṭṭi koṟṟavāyiluṭaiyā neḻuttu Ivai pu
rovaritinaikkaḷattu mukaveṭṭi UlakaThis inscription is left unfinished.
Digital edition of SII 5.703 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
